name: Champagne Sorbet with Wild Strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring three-quarters (750 ml) of the champagne to a boil in a saucepan.
2. Remove from heat and let cool.
3. Combine the granulated sugar and 2 cups water in a pan, stirring until the sugar is fully dissolved. Bring the mixture to a boil, then continue cooking for 20 minutes, stirring frequently, until it reaches a thread consistency when a small amount is pulled between your thumb and forefinger.
4. Remove from heat immediately and stir in the lemon juice and orange juice.
5. Cool the mixture thoroughly before freezing it in a plastic container until firm, several hours or overnight.
6. Once frozen, transfer the sorbet to a bowl and beat with an electric mixer until smooth. Return it to the freezer until ready to serve.
7. Serve scoops of sorbet on chilled plates or in glasses, garnished with wild strawberries or strawberry slices.
